briefdescription.para: This enum contains list of device key types.
AES minimum tag length in bytes.
AES NIST recommended minimum tag length in bytes.
AES maximum tag length in bytes.
AES-CCM minimum nonce length in bytes.
AES-CCM maximum nonce length in bytes.
Command ID for AES operation command.
Command ID for AES KAT command.
Maximum number of commands supported by AES module.
Select this mode to run AES DPA KAT.
ASU DMA maximum transfer length in bytes.
Shift value to double the curve length.
Command ID for ECC sign generation.
Command ID for ECC sign verification.
Command ID for ECDH generate shared secret.
Command ID for ECC public key generation.
Command ID for ECC public key validation.
Maximum number of commands supported by ECC module.
Size of NIST P-192 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-224 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-256 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-320 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-384 private key size in bytes.
Size of Brainpool P-512 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-521 private key size in bytes.
Size of Edwards Ed448 private key size in bytes.
Size of Curve448 private key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-521 public key size in bytes.
Size of NIST P-384 public key size in bytes.
Command ID for ECIES encrypt command.
Command ID for ECIES decrypt command.
Command ID for ECIES encrypt command.
Command ID for ECIES decrypt command.
Command ID for ECIES KAT command.
Maximum number of commands supported by ECIES module.
Command ID for HMAC compute for SHA2 command.
Command ID for HMAC compute for SHA3 command.
Command ID for HMAC KAT command.
Maximum number of commands supported by HMAC module.
Command ID for KDF generate for SHA2 command.
Command ID for KDF generate for SHA3 command.
Command ID for KDF KAT command.
Command ID for CMAC based KDF generate command.
Command ID for HKDF generate using SHA2 command.
Command ID for HKDF generate using SHA3 command.
Maximum number of commands supported by KDF module.
Command ID for key vault creation.
Command ID for key vault deletion.
Command ID for AES key generation.
Command ID for AES IV generation.
Command ID for raw key generation.
Command ID for RSA key pair generation.
Command ID for ECC key pair generation.
Command ID for storing key in vault.
Command ID for exporting key vault.
Command ID for importing key vault.
Maximum number of commands supported by KeyManager module.
Size in bytes of the field storing actual exported keyvault data size.
Marker for keys that never expire.
Bit mask for wrapped key type.
Maximum number of key vaults supported.
Max key length for KDF/HMAC in key vault.
RSA private key sign use case.
RSA private key decryption use case.
RSA private key key transport use case.
RSA public key sign verification use case.
RSA public key encryption use case.
RSA public key key transport use case.
ECC public key sign verification use case.
ECC public key key agreement use case.
ECC public key key authentication and encryption use case.
ECC private key sign use case.
ECC private key key agreement use case.
ECC private key key authentication and encryption use case.
ECC private key for public key generation.
LMS public key signature verification use case.
Maximum allowed value for RSA private key attribute.
Command ID for Key wrap using SHA2.
Command ID for Key wrap using SHA3.
Command ID for Key unwrap using SHA2.
Command ID for Key unwrap using SHA3.
Command ID for Key wrap unwrap KAT.
Maximum number of commands supported by Key wrap unwrap module.
Key wrap unwrap output length size.
Command ID for LMS signature verification with SHA2.
Command ID for LMS signature verification with SHA3.
Command ID for HSS signature verification with SHA2.
Command ID for HSS signature verification with SHA3.
Maximum number of commands supported by LMS module.
Hash output length for N=24 parameter sets.
Hash output length for N=32 parameter sets.
LMS/HSS Signature size bounds per NIST SP 800-208.

detaileddescription.para: Min LMS sig: N=24, W=8, H=5 → q[4] + LMOTS[652] + type[4] + path[24*5=120] = 780 Max HSS sig (2-level): Nspk[4] + LMS_max[9324] + pub_N32[56] + LMS_max[9324] = 18708Minimum NIST-valid LMS signature size

briefdescription.para: Maximum NIST-valid HSS signature size (2-level, N=32, W=1, H=25)
Command ID for DevIk x509 certificate generation.
Command ID for DevAk x509 certificate generation.
Command ID for DevIk CSR x509 certificate generation.
Command ID for UDE challenge request.
Command ID for UDE private keys encryption.
Command ID for Hardware Unique Key generation.
Maximum number of commands supported by OCP module.
Hardware Unique Key size in bytes (256-bit AES key)
X.509 certificate max size in bytes.
Command ID for RSA public encryption.
Command ID for RSA private decryption.
Command ID for RSA private CRT decryption.
Command ID for OAEP encryption with SHA2.
Command ID for OAEP decryption with SHA2.
Command ID for OAEP encryption with SHA3.
Command ID for OAEP decryption with SHA3.
Command ID for PSS sign generation with SHA2.
Command ID for PSS sign verification with SHA2.
Command ID for PSS sign generation with SHA3.
Command ID for PSS sign verification with SHA3.
KAT command for RSA OAEP encryption and decryption.
KAT command for RSA PSS sign generation and verification.
Maximum number of commands supported by RSA module.
RSA output data length size in bytes.
RSA max key size in words.
RSA max prime size in words.
Input data hash is already calculated.
Command ID for SHA3 operation command.
Command ID for SHA3 KAT command.
Maximum number of commands supported by SHA module.
Command is in progress by ASUFW.
Command DMA wait operation is complete.
Command execution is complete by ASUFW.
Response status index in response buffer.
Response buffer address index in response buffer.
Mask for command ID in header.
Mask for command unique request ID.
Shift value for unique request ID.
Maximum unique IDs generated by ASU.
Mask for command length in header.
Mask for secure bit in command header.
Shift for secure flag in command header.
ASUFW run time configuration area base address.
Base address of module info of size (180 bytes)
Base address of execution status of size 1 byte.
Base address of maximum size of key vault.
Maximum IPI channels supported by ASUFW.
Command ID for TRNG Get Random Bytes.
Command ID for TRNG DRBG instantiate.
Command ID for TRNG DRBG reseed.
Command ID for TRNG DRBG generate.
Maximum number of commands supported by TRNG module.
